purpose: Open, inspectable AI work-partner engine for source-aware team context and policy-bounded action.

boundedContexts.name: workspace-model
boundedContexts.responsibility: Compile source-system structures and YAML overlays into Sarathi policy boundaries.

boundedContexts.name: identity-access
boundedContexts.responsibility: Define Better Auth-facing identity and Sarathi authorization ports.

boundedContexts.name: boundary-policy
boundedContexts.responsibility: Evaluate trust, sensitivity, delegation stage, approval, and model-egress decisions before retrieval, tool invocation, or model egress.

boundedContexts.name: follow-up
boundedContexts.responsibility: Format generic due-item planning and exception digests from approved source-system context.

boundedContexts.name: messaging
boundedContexts.responsibility: Model incoming and outgoing Microsoft Teams-ready messages without binding domain code to Bot Framework adapters.

boundedContexts.name: strategy-kernel
boundedContexts.responsibility: Model Sarathi-owned intent, evidence, projections, accountability actions, workspace relations, migrations, and workspace pack contracts.
